entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud EDI Integration Strategy
entry.content:
Hello all,

Is that possible to use some of the following API's for EDI integration (EDI 945 Shipping confirmation and stock confirmation) without 1ZQ scope item activated for the corresponding storage location?

  • Warehouse Shipping Advice – Receive from Warehouse (B2B) - Used for 3rd party WMS integration with scope item 1ZQ
  • Outbound Delivery (A2X) - Makes sense, but contrary to what has been mention on this forum, this synchronous. 

If not, is there any other API available for the scenario previously mentioned for S4 Hana Cloud Public?

entry.title: Where I can start learning Identity provisioning service
Error en creación orden de venta
entry.content:
Al intentar generar una orden de venta a partir de una oferta de venta ocurre el siguiente error: La cantidad indicada hará que el campo "Cantidad pendiente" sea inconsistente con el campo "Cantidad de inventario pendiente" en el documento base. Indique una cantidad diferente.

La definición del artículo esta de la siguiente manera:

 

Y en el documento esta indicado esa unidad de medida es la que se quiere utilizar

Y en donde veo la diferencia que me indica el mensaje de error es en estos campos:

entry.title: Re: Campaign auto restart after error - adjust timing
entry.content:
Hello 

Which on prem release of SAP Marketing are you using?
If you use the 2020 release, I will suggest that you open an incident for the component CEC-MKT-CPG-EXE and we will help you to set a control parameter which might influence this 30 minutes delay.

Best regards,
Marc Dorais
Application Innovation Services (AIS), SAP Marketing 
SAP Development Support

entry.title: Onboarding 1.0 Not Prompting for ID Information
entry.content:
Hi,

I am wondering if anyone else is having issues in Onboarding 1.0 as of this past week where the I-9 Verifier is not prompted to enter the ID details. It goes directly to DocuSign for their signature and section 2 is blank. Then the E-Verify case will not go through as the doc number and state are missing. I have a manual work around, but this is crazy.

I opened a ticket with SAP Support, but as usual, I feel like I'm pleading for a resolution or at least for them to push this up to Engineering or Product Management or someone who can look into why this is happening. Unacceptable.

Ticket 630776/2024 

Thank you,

Julie

entry.title: Re: Be a Cockroach: A Simple Guide to AI and SAP Full-Stack Development - Part II
entry.content: your class load method has some cut n paste issue.  have a look at your SELECT statement.  the into table need to have @LT_xxxx in general.

entry.title: Re: Down-payment clearing of AuC
entry.content: Hello We solved this issue applying the SAp Note: 2725359 - Investment measure settlement: Settlement of sender costs from previous years SAP Note, Version: 5, Released On: 26.09.2023.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Demand and Supply Segmentation - A practical guide for Solution Architects
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing.

I have some questions from reading the documentation (See links below), there is a note

  • Segmentation and the related processes are supported only for distribution center (DC).
  • Segmentation is supported for configurable materials (material type KMAT).
  • Segmentation is supported for variants of configurable materials (KMAT).

Q1) What does only supported for DC mean?

Q2) Do all materials used for segmentation need to be of material type KMAT and/or configurable materials?

Q3) What about existing materials already used. Can they be changed/converted into materials that can be used for segmentation? in Fashion Management transaction "SGT_CONVERT_MATERIAL" is mentioned.

In general I find the documentation a bit confusing. Should I look for documentation under "Fashion Management" or " Logistics General" or both?

BR

Jan Kudsk

 

 

 

 

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/25a41481f62e469ba0e61015a0d39d20/50d69e52c406215ce10000000a44538d.html

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FASHION_MANAGEMENT/3d09d3032a1649f4abf6eea0a8f3ed11/7cb42f52a3a7c410e10000000a441470.html

entry.title: Re: Down-payment clearing of AuC
entry.content: After apply the note, we ran TX CJ88 in the new fiscal year and down payments were posted after the last settlemen.

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas on Public Cloud: Search help problem when move custom fields to header in VA02
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have some custom fields on VA02 screen. Some of the custom fields need to be in header part of the screen. I moved them with screen personas as shown below.

We can see values when custom fields were filled elsewhere. So far everything has worked smoothly. Until we want to change them values with using F4 in VA02 screen. If F4 is used while on a tab outside the custom fields, we see same F4 screen both custom fields in the header part. If F4 is used in the custom fields tab, there is no problem about custom fields.

After that I tried to write a script for the second custom field in the header part. I used it onF4 event of the custom field. The script is as shown below.

if (session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM').selectedTab.id == 'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14') {
session
.findById(
'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4332/subCFD_SCREEN:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:1000/subSUBSCREEN_5:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:2074/ctxtGS_SAP_GUI_UI_FIELDS-ASSOCIATION_FIELD_VALUE',
)
.setFocus();

session.findById('wnd[0]').sendVKey(4);
} else {

session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14').select();
session.findById('wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14').executeWebRequest('post', 'proxy', 'assert/tabswitch', null, null);
session
.findById(
'wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_ITEM/tabpT\\14/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4332/subCFD_SCREEN:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:1000/subSUBSCREEN_5:SAPLCFD_SAP_GUI:2074/ctxtGS_SAP_GUI_UI_FIELDS-ASSOCIATION_FIELD_VALUE',
)
.setFocus();
session.findById('wnd[0]').sendVKey(4);
}

When I execute the script in the script editor, everything is fine. There is no dump or error. I assigned the script to second custom field. After that I press the F4. Nothing about F4 opens on first use. On the second use, it gives an error as follows.

Choosing "Redraw the screen" is showing the F4 screen. After that error everything is working correctly. Opening F4 on each tab works properly.

Is there any solution for that problem with script or without script? Or is there a step I'm doing wrong?

Thanks in advance for any input.

Berk.

entry.title: Re: Date shown wrong in SAP Analytics Cloud based on SAP...
entry.content:
Hello @tilted ,

Two things to perform:

1) You can change the data display settings in your user accounts, set this to dd-MM-YYYY. To change this >> User >> Settings >> Language & Region >> Date Formatting - change here

2) Create a calculated column Date1 with datatype string in the desired format e.g: TO_VARCHAR(DELIVERYDATE,'DD-MM-YYYY')

3) Create another calculated column Date2 with datatype Date, use the function CAST to convert back to date. e.g: CAST(Date1 AS DATE) - this time apply the conversion on the first calculated column.  

This helps to preseve the datatype format without a need for the text association.

Happy modeling, Cheers, Mahesh

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP CAP with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello @BarcDe,

No, I haven't worked on it. I do understand that the documentation is trying to say something, link by link, but it's not clear! I think SAP is basically saying that this process is not straightforward. 🙂 There's something about SAP Could ALM and its APIs for Operations

More prerequisites on OpenTelemetry@SAP and I'm even suspicious someone has done this before here on earth. 😄 I think you should file an incident/report a case and ask for their assistance.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Authenticating an API using SAML assertion in SAP API Management
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am having a requirement to authenticate the API exposed via API Management using the SAML Assertion with out using the third party like Azure. The external application does not generate the SAML Assertion. Is there any way where we can generate the assertion in API Management itself to authenticate the external Application?. From API management to SAP we can do that using SAML assertion policy . 

Please help me on this.

Regards

Giridhar

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
Which Oracle driver are you using - the ODBC driver from Oracle, Oracle Native, or the MS ODBC driver?

I HIGHLY recommend using a native Oracle connection over any other type of connection you might have available.  It is much more stable and reliable than the others and you'll have access to Oracle-specific functionality that you don't necessarily get with drivers that aren't from Oracle.  Also, make sure that the Oracle Client that you've installed is the most updated version that works with Oracle 19.

-Dell

entry.title: How to setting URL Query parameters using CL_HTTP_CLIENT with GET Method
entry.content:
To setting URL Query parameters using CL_HTTP_CLIENT with GET Method

after call  cl_http_client=>create_by_url and get a object client

 

cl_http_client=>create_by_url(
EXPORTING
  url                = lc_trans_url
IMPORTING
  client             = lo_http_client
EXCEPTIONS
  argument_not_found = 1
  plugin_not_active  = 2
  internal_error     = 3
  ).

 

you can set parameters this way...Url Query Parameters are traspased using request method SET_FORM_FIELD or SET_FORM_FIELDS using a key-value table.

 

lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name  = 'QueryParam1' value = 'Value1' ).
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name  = 'QueryParam2' value = 'Value2' ).
...
lo_http_client->request->set_form_field( name  = 'QueryParamN' value = 'ValueN' ).

 

 

If somebody know other way please tell me with your comment.

Thank you community .

entry.title: Value Help with edit field and navigation
entry.content:
I've been developing applications with SAP RAP for some time now, and so far, I've been able to meet all the requirements using the various available functionalities.

However, I am currently facing a challenge with the following scenario: I need to develop a search help that allows me to select multiple records, modify a specific field, and navigate to the details of a selected record.

This should be similar to what is available in this standard application.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Not able to cascade a picklist ( State & City )
entry.content:
Hi @SnehaSahay,

Looks like you have to validate "field criteria" in the object definition for the city field. Please follow the steps provided in this KBA 2352794 - How to create cascading MDF picklists? 

If this information helped you, please, Accept as Solution.

Cristian Ocampo

entry.title: EWM Picking Nested HU
entry.content:
Hello, I need some help regarding picking nested HU. I have scenario where the main HU has 5 nested HU. Each one has a quantity in KG and they are all different. I get an ODO created and the WT is also created. The user will scan the nested HU until the quantity is covered. He always remove the whole nested HU. I'm getting an error trying to replicate this. Even adjusting the quantity of the WT with an exception code to match the quantity of two whole nested HU, the system still gives an error. Had anyone have a similar scenario? 

Thanks,

entry.title: User unable to export the paystub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device.
entry.content:
Hi Community

We have an issue with paystub.

One user is unable to export his paytub to PDF using an iPad/iOS device, he can do it using a laptop or a computer, but he is traveeling and he needs to be able usin his iPad.

Do you know what could be the issue?

We already confirm he has all the requiered permissions.

Thanks.

entry.content: Check if the service is exposed through the SAP Cloud Connector.

entry.content:

I am configuring a brand new Solution Manager 7.2 system in transaction solman_setup. In point 2.2 the activity Check Java Software Prerequisites fails miserably:

Checking the installed components:

I have updated ISAGENT according to the recommendations in SAP note 2068401 - How to update the ISAgent (Byte Code Adapter) - SAP Solution Manager 7.1 / 7.2

After the update:

Reexecuting the activity:

Please kindly let me know how to fix this and make it green, besides painting it with green paint... Many thanks!

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA Data Migration Cockpit Clarification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created few custom fields for a customer's (Key User Extensibility Fields). We are in the stage of migrating their legacy system data into SAP.

There is a data migration template called (Source data for Customer - extend existing record by new org levels) where it has the custom fields I have created in the system. But whatever the value I put in the template and migration is also getting successful, but somehow couldn't see the value getting reflected on the customer master data records.

Please advise what could be wrong in here.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Please refer to the below screenshot

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Its possible the Cross Plant maintenance company in s...
entry.content: Hi Enda, I appreciate your prompt response. The Your flocs/Equip then need a maintenance plant of M1/2/3/4, and a planning plant of M1. THe flocs/equip need to be assigned to cost centres for the given plant (M1/2/3/4). And the task lists and maintenance plans are also setup in planning plant M1.technical objects h

entry.title: Re: Wily Introscope offline no matter what :-(
entry.content: Dear Customer, the wily EM is trying to connect to the solman JAVA system in the failed step, so it's suggested to check latest SOLMAN JAVA defaultTrace under /usr/sap/<SID>/<instance>j2ee/cluster/server0/log/default trace (latest).

entry.title: Re: How to sort based on user input values
entry.content:
You can approach this the same way in SQL as in ABAP. Create a temporary table, loop over the conditions, read the data with the conditions as keys and append the data to the temp table. Note that there should be a more efficient way using joins etc.

CLASS zcl_application DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    TYPES :
      ty_col_1 TYPE i,
      ty_col_2 TYPE c LENGTH 1,
      ty_col_3 TYPE c LENGTH 1.

    TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_data,
              col_1 TYPE ty_col_1,
              col_2 TYPE ty_col_2,
              col_3 TYPE ty_col_3,
            END OF ty_data.

    TYPES tt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_data WITH KEY col_1.

    TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_user_input,
              col_2 TYPE ty_col_2,
              col_3 TYPE ty_col_3,
            END OF ty_user_input.

    TYPES tt_user_input TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_user_input WITH KEY col_2.

    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.

    CLASS-METHODS sort
*      AMDP OPTIONS CDS SESSION CLIENT current
      IMPORTING
                VALUE(it_unsorted_table) TYPE tt_data
                VALUE(it_user_input)     TYPE tt_user_input
      EXPORTING VALUE(et_sorted_data)    TYPE tt_data.

  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.
CLASS zcl_application IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD sort BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT OPTIONS READ-ONLY.

    declare lt_result, lt_stack table like :et_sorted_data;
    declare i, j, lv_cond_lines_1, lv_cond_lines_2 integer;
    declare lv_condition_col_2, lv_condition_col_3  nvarchar( 1 );

    lt_conditions_col_2 = SELECT col_2 FROM :it_user_input;
    lv_cond_lines_1 = ::ROWCOUNT;
    lt_conditions_col_3 = SELECT col_3 FROM :it_user_input WHERE col_3 <> '';
    lv_cond_lines_2 = ::ROWCOUNT;

    /* DML enabled data as a temp stack to handle duplication */
    INSERT INTO :lt_stack SELECT * FROM :IT_UNSORTED_TABLE;

    FOR i IN 1..LV_COND_LINES_1 DO
        FOR j IN 1..LV_COND_LINES_2 DO

            lv_condition_col_2 = :lt_conditions_col_2.col_2[ i ];
            lv_condition_col_3 = :lt_conditions_col_3.col_3[ j ];

            INSERT INTO :lt_result (
                    SELECT *
                    FROM
                        :lt_stack
                    WHERE
                        col_2 = lv_condition_col_2 and
                        col_3 = lv_condition_col_3
                 );

             DELETE FROM :lt_stack
             WHERE
                    col_2 = lv_condition_col_2 and
                    col_3 = lv_condition_col_3;

        END FOR;
    END FOR;

    et_sorted_data = select * from :lt_result;
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ltc_application DEFINITION FOR TESTING
  RISK LEVEL HARMLESS
  DURATION SHORT.

  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS test  FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.

ENDCLASS.


CLASS ltc_application IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD test.

    DATA lt_user_input TYPE zcl_application=>tt_user_input.
    DATA lt_unsorted_table TYPE zcl_application=>tt_data.
    DATA lt_expected TYPE zcl_application=>tt_data.
    DATA lt_actual TYPE zcl_application=>tt_data.

    lt_user_input = VALUE #(
        ( col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_2 = 'D' col_3 = 'x' )
        ( col_2 = 'C' col_3 = '' )
    ).

    lt_unsorted_table = VALUE #(
        ( col_1 = 1  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 2  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 3  col_2 = 'C' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 4  col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 5  col_2 = 'D' col_3 = 'x' )
        ( col_1 = 6  col_2 = 'C' col_3 = 'x' )
        ( col_1 = 7  col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 8  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 9  col_2 = 'D' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 10 col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'z' )
    ).

    lt_expected = VALUE #(
        ( col_1 = 2  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 8  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 1  col_2 = 'B' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 7  col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 4  col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 10 col_2 = 'A' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 9  col_2 = 'D' col_3 = 'z' )
        ( col_1 = 5  col_2 = 'D' col_3 = 'x' )
        ( col_1 = 3  col_2 = 'C' col_3 = 'y' )
        ( col_1 = 6  col_2 = 'C' col_3 = 'x' )
    ).

    zcl_application=>sort(
      EXPORTING
        it_unsorted_table = lt_unsorted_table
        it_user_input     = lt_user_input
      IMPORTING
        et_sorted_data    = lt_actual
    ).

    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals(
      EXPORTING
        act = lt_actual
        exp = lt_expected
    ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: solman admin cockpit - schedule import job missing
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: BPMON setup for Number Range Monitoring
entry.content:
Object - EUROPARTNR, Yellow Threshold - 80, Red Threshold as 90 and Number Range Number as 2.

When checking in the Table NRIV in the system, it has above details and NRLEVEL as 0000000000000000.

Now BPMon monitoring object was configured with the condition NRRANGENR=02.

It should send the alert notification as the NRLEVEL is Zero but no alert notification has been sent.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BPMON setup for Number Range Monitoring
entry.content:
> Object - EUROPARTNR, Yellow Threshold - 80, Red Threshold as 90 and Number Range Number as 2.
This means, the key figure will search for the entry which has 'OBJECT=EUROPARTNR' and 'NRRANGENR=2' from the table NRIV and check whether its fill level was exceeded 80% (yellow) or 90% (red).
　
The value of Number Range Number (NRRANGENR in NRIV) you've configured in the BPMon monitoring object will be used by the key figure to find out the correct entry in NRIV to monitor.
NRRANGENR has a fixed value which will not be changed.
The value of NRLEVEL means the current number range value so if it has 0000000000000000, it means that this number range has not been used yet so its fill level is 0%.
　
After finding out the correct entry from NRIV, the key figure will check FROMNUMBER, TONUMBER and NRLEVEL to calculate the current fill level.
　
For example, if the entry which has 'OBJECT=EUROPARTNR' and 'NRRANGENR=2' in the table NRIV shows below value, 
=============
FROMNUMBER:  000000010000000000 | TONUMBER: 000000099999999999 | NRLEVEL: 00000000010000000587
=============
　
The fill level(%) will be calculated as follows:
(10000000587 - 10000000000) / (99999999999  - 10000000587) * 100
=> 0.0000000655222222 %
As the value of fill level will be rounded off to the nearest whole number, it is 0%.

entry.title: How to start a java application in BTP from Job Scheduling Service
entry.content:
I have a JAVA application running in BTP.

I would like to create a schedule to run this application every 24 hours and am trying to use the 'Job Scheduling Service' for the same. 

I do not want to create a 'Job' for the same, as that would require having the application running 24x7 with a rest endpoint exposed, but that will consume too much memory. Instead, I want to be able to start the app once every 24 hours and am trying to create a 'Task' in the Job Scheduling Service Dashboard to do the same.

I can't seem to figure out the supported 'Action' values for these. I want to write an action to start the corresponding application. Any help on the same would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

It's suggested to try the following two steps to resolve the error:

  1. Make sure that the most recent data from the solman JAVA system has been transferred to the LMDB. In the LMDB, you will be able to see the ISAgent 10.8 is listed as the software component version.
  2. Update CR Content to latest version by following instructions on SAP Note 669669.
  3. Ensure that the landscape cache is up to date for the system. Run the report RLAPI_MANUAL_SINGLE_SYNC as outlined in SAP Note 1769269.

The other useful steps are in KBA 2404171 - Check Java Software Prerequisites error shows wrong components - SAP Solution Manager 7.2

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: ABAP
entry.content: The order is a, d, c, b. See inheritance and constructors documentation

entry.title: Re: How to mark the top of the SAC filter panel
entry.content: Thanks a lot William.

entry.title: Re: Calling on-premise ODATA from SAP CAP
entry.content: I found the cause SAP CAP framework send the date 2024-05-23T00:00Z to SAP on-premise system But SAP on-premise system accepts date 2024-05-23T00:00 ( without Z) . So I removed the Z from the date before calling on -premise .

entry.title: Re: The field Product Hierarchy (MARA-PRDHA) does not app...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please try the Fiori APP "Manage Product Hierarchies" to maintain the product hierarchy info.

For product hierarchy in S/4HANA Cloud, please check the blog below for a complete understanding about how-to-use: Setting Up & Using The Product Hierarchy Functiona... - SAP Community

Best Regards
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Call browser based on ABAP RAP Action
entry.content: Hi, were you able to achieve this, I have a similar requirement.

entry.title: Re: Calling on-premise ODATA from SAP CAP
entry.content:
I found the cause SAP CAP framework send the date 2024-05-23T00:00Z to SAP on-premise system But SAP on-premise system accepts date 2024-05-23T00:00 ( without Z) . So I removed the Z from the date before calling on -premise . Here is the sample code 

 

    this.on(["READ"], "TIMEENTRIES", async (req: any) => {
      let { where } = req.query.SELECT;
      if (Array.isArray(where)) {
        //Remove Z from the date string as it is not accepted in SAP on-premise system
        // Input 2024-05-23T00:00Z Output 2024-05-23T00:00
        where.forEach((row: any) => {
          if (typeof row === "object" && "val" in row && DateUtil.isDateValid(row.val)) {
            row.val = row.val.toString().replaceAll("Z", "");
          }
        });
      }
      const timeCostEntry = await cds.connect.to("ZTIMECOSTENTRY_SRV");
      return timeCostEntry.run(req.query);
    });

entry.title: Re: Single Invoice per Payer and different Sold to
entry.content:
Hi,

According to Billing Document Split and Convergence | SAP Help Portal:

As a general rule, the system tries to combine into one billing document all transactions with the same sold-to party, default billing date, billing type, and sales organization.

A complete list of criteria that will cause billing split refers to: Split Criteria | SAP Help Portal

To prevent an unwanted billing document split, you'll need to utilize extensions described in How to Prevent or Force a Billing Document Split | SAP Help Portal. The fields which your custom code can modify to prevent a billing document split are listed. Unfortunately, different sold-to parties seem not to be supported in the context of preventing a billing document split.

Best Regards.
Fancy

entry.title: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
As we all know, pricing is really important when it comes to sales documents. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can add custom fields to sales documents using key user extensibility. You can then use these custom fields like any other standard field in your pricing configuration. When you then change the value of these custom fields in a sales document, you can modify the price of a sales document. In this blog post, we show you how to create and use a custom field in pricing. Just follow the steps!

In our example, we create a new item field for a member status in sales orders. Depending on the member status (Gold, Silver, or Bronze), you can award your customers specific discounts.

1. Create a custom field in the Custom Fields app

First, create a custom field for sales documents (business context: Sales: Sales Document Item). In this example, we create the field ITEMMEMBERSTATUS.

Enable the usage of this field for Sales Document to Pricing Communication on Item Level on the Business Scenarios tab.

On the User Interfaces tab, enable the usage for the Manage Sales Orders – Version 2 app.

Publish your custom field. The custom field is created in two business contexts: Sales: Pricing Communication Item and Sales: Sales Document Item.

Open the custom field in the Sales: Pricing Communication Item business context. On the APIs tab, enable the usage of the field for Condition Record for Pricing in Sales.

On the User Interfaces tab, enable the usage of the field for Manage Prices – Sales and Manage Tax Rates – Sales. This allows you to maintain the prices in the Manage Prices – Sales app in step 8.

2. Add the custom field to the field catalog for pricing in sales

In your configuration environment, search for the Change Field Catalog for Pricing in Sales (ID: 103118) configuration activity. Use the value help to add the custom field to the field catalog.

3. Add the custom field to a condition table

Search for the Create Condition Tables for Pricing in Sales (ID: 103119) configuration activity. Create a condition table and add the custom field.

Note down the number of the generated condition table for the next steps. In this example, we create condition table 502.

4. Create an access sequence for the condition table

Search for the Set Access Sequences (ID: 103121) configuration activity. Create an access sequence for the condition table that you created in step 3. In this example, we create access sequence ZIMS.

 

 

5. Create a condition type for the access sequence

Search for the Set Condition Types for Pricing in Sales (ID: 101120) configuration activity. Create a condition type for the access sequence that you created in step 4. In this example, we create the condition type ZIMS.

6. Create a pricing procedure for the condition type

Search for the Set Pricing Procedures (ID: 101117) configuration activity. Create a pricing procedure for the condition type that you created in step 5.

 

 

7. Set the pricing procedure determination for the pricing procedure

Search for the Set Pricing Procedure Determination (ID: 101118) configuration activity. Set the pricing procedure determination for the pricing procedure that you created in step 6.

8. Create condition records for the condition type

Open the Manage Prices - Sales app. Create a condition record for condition type ZIMS.

9. Testing your configuration

Once you're done with your configuration, add the custom field to the UI the Manage Sales Orders – Version 2 app using UI Runtime adaptation. Then, select a value for this custom field on the UI and choose Update Prices. 

You have now added a custom field for pricing to a sales document!

If you want to automatically set the value of the custom field by reading from the customer master, for example, you can also use the BAdI Modification of Item Custom Fields in Sales Documents (SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM). You can find further information about how to use BAdIs in sales documents in this blog post.

Additional information:

Documentation for Custom Fields in Pricing
Key User Extensibility in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales

 

Was this blog post helpful for you? Please share your ideas and feedback, they are very much appreciated for future blog posts.

entry.title: Re: How to change the filter in Manage Sales Orders?
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use custom field to fulfill this requirement. I tried to custom a field with a Business Context of Sales: Sales Document (SD_SALESDOC) in system, then I enabled the relevant data reference. Finally I can see the field in tha APP of Manage Sales Orders - Version 2. You can have a try.

Best Regards,

Zhehui

entry.title: Column net price is empty
entry.content:
Dear expert:    

       By t-code me31k, Create two service contracts document whose material group in contact item are same. the material group is 007 ( services ).  the different is services master data of service line in document，one service number of contract document is 100225, the other service number of document is 100227.  then, By t-code me51n, Create purchase requisition document with material group 007 ( services ) and service number 100225. Double click "assign source of supply" in source of supply tab, the system show source of list, but I find that the column net price in some document is empty. for example document 4600000106， the net price in some document is not empty. for example document 4600000107.  

       Why the column net price in this two document show different behaviors. Is this standard behaviors? I think this is problem, could you please check this problem in internet sap system. screen shots is as below.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Error appears while displaying "host" tab in alert in...
entry.content:
Please try the following KBA:
2398328 - Error "The value entered in fields "Technical System" is not valid" in Alert Inbox

Best Regards,
Weihua

entry.title: Re: How to make hard reservation for production order
entry.content:
1. For the header material （Finished material） in the production order, the "Strategy Group" in MRP 3 should be MTO (ex. 20).

2. For the component, the "Individual/coll." in MRP4 should be 1.

3. And there is a Sales order for the Finished material, and the production order should link the sales order (Which means the requirement from the sales order, then run MRP to generate the Planed order, then transfer the planned order into production order).

4. For the component "Individual/coll." =1, the stock should be link the sales order, and for the order production order cannot use this material's stock.

More detail information, you can check the scope item "BJE".

Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Thanks,

Krishna

entry.title: 上新啦！SAP 分析云 2024.11 版功能更新
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.11 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第3季度版本的一部分提供。在此处可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本1.0.407，以利用所有数据采集类型。

代理的最低版本仍为 1.0.75，但以下情况除外：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库的版本 1.0.99
  • SAP universe （UNX） 的版本 1.0.365（SAP 分析云代理需要其他设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明 3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse （BW） 的版本 1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View 的版本 1.0.235
  • File Server版本 1.0.248

有关详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关SAP BW与SAP分析云集成的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅SAP Note 2541557了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP分析云的 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 实时访问Universe时的支持功能和需求更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的简易部署工具包。

  • 注意：为避免下载旧版本，以及可能让用户面对Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的不当绑定问题，只有三个最新版本的工具包可供下载。

有关云代理版本变更管理详情，请参阅 SAP Note 3264839。

更新亮点

  • 管理和服务管理
    • 防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户
  • 数据发掘
    • 在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算
    • 数据分析器中保留上次使用值
  • 数据集成
    • 数据导出 API – 增量差异
    • 支持基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证
  • 故事设计
    • 优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片
    • 在地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层
  • 故事可扩展性
    • 以动态文本或脚本 API 的形式检索非输入就绪变量

 

管理和服务管理

防止丢失通过 BTP 意外删除的 SAP 分析云租户

如果您不小心在 SAP BTP 主控室中删除了服务实例，可在七天内恢复。点击此处此处了解更多信息。

 

数据发掘

在数据分析器中为两个结构BW查询添加对结构成员的计算

在“可用对象”面板的“结构”部分中增加了“+添加计算”按钮。这样就可以在 BW的两个结构化查询中使用结构成员创建计算。

 

数据分析器中保留上次使用值

现在，上次使用的已定义部件和交互值将被保留，在重新打开数据分析器时，选项将保持不变。数据分析器用户现在可以设置以下内容：

  • 默认显示/隐藏过滤器行
  • 分别打开/关闭样式面板和构建器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，展开/折叠样式设置面板和生成器面板和可用对象列表
  • 默认情况下，在数据源浏览器中设置系统和连接类型
  • 保留 PDF、Microsoft Excel 和 CSV 导出对话框中的所有设置（导出名称除外）

 

数据集成

数据导出 API - 增量差异

数据导出服务 API 订阅已扩展，以支持在执行增量提取时计算新旧数值增量值之间的差异，而不仅仅是新度量值。

 

基于 OData 连接的 X509 证书身份验证

用户现在可以选择客户端证书身份验证，并将 X.509 证书用于通用 OData 连接、SAP Business ByDesign Analytics 和 SAP S4/HANA Cloud 连接。

 

故事设计

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片

优化故事体验现在支持导出为 Google 幻灯片。Google 幻灯片可以另存为新演示文稿，也可以添加到 Google Drive 文件夹现有演示文稿中。

精简查看器中不支持这一功能。

 

地理可视化对象中，精简版查看器现在支持按维着色的气泡图层

精简查看器现在支持地理地图中的气泡图层按维着色。按维着色的气泡图层将不再自动重新定向到完整查看器。

“地理可视化对象”的交互性也有一些改进：

对地理可视化的交互性进行了一些改进，其中包括：

  • 改进了与按维着色的气泡的交互
  • 使用工具提示合并钻取
  • 改进阈值工具提示

 

故事可扩展性

在优化故事体验中，动态文本和与变量相关的脚本 API（如 getVariables 和 getVariableValues）现在支持非输入就绪变量。

从与 SAP Business Warehouse （SAP BW） 的实时连接中检索未准备好输入的变量，例如客户出口变量：

  • 作为动态文本
  • 通过脚本 API
    • getDataSource（）.getVariableValues（）
    • getDataSource（）.getVariables

 

本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和改进功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP 知识库文章。

如果您对本博文的内容有任何疑问，可以在下方发表评论。如果您有具体的产品或技术问题，请在我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 问答论坛上提问。访问我们的 SAP Analytics Cloud 社区页面，了解更多产品信息、卓越实践等。查看我们的 SAP 路线图浏览器，了解 SAP Analytics Cloud 即将推出的更多功能。

entry.title: Re: can not re-read production order's PP master data(WM...
entry.content:
This a old thread, but I came across it when I was looking for an answer. This is answered in the following thread that was posted later in 2013.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/read-pp-master-data-co02/qaq-p/11283858

Essentially, there is a SAP note - 1642564, provides a workaround.

entry.title: ็How to select open item with "AND" Condition when call FM POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARINGN?
entry.content:
Hi, Expert 

I want to open item with zuonr and belnr. Can anyone help me ?

thank you very much

entry.title: Re: Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supp...
entry.content:
Hello,

in my eyes there are two techn. ways to write data from outside into Datasphere: 

  • Using the Database User with the Open SQL Schema 
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/3de55a78a4614deda589633baea28645.html?locale=en-US
  • Or using the Command Line Interface (It's more for the DSP Tenant Owner, than an external System)
    https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d4f3c5a0bb074d09ae9b42b2b9bd7a08/1874de554ccd4ce4bb56c26e280bdaaf.html?locale=en-US
    This is more for mass creating / updating Objects or Users.
    (Not sure at all if you could trigger a Dataload)

However instead of writing (push) into the Datasphere, I would rather just read(pull) the Data and use the Standard way. (Create a Connection and Federate/Replicate the Data into Datasphere)
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/5d36f1aae68a4e59989c424a66d948c9.html

Hope this helps

entry.title: How to delete alert
entry.content:
Hi, using SAP version 10 FP2108.

According to SAP help document, alert can be deleted. I have include the help document here for reference:

Remove User AlertSelect one or multiple user alerts and choose this option to remove them.

You can configure user authorizations for alerts management in the Authorizations window.

If you’re upgrading from a lower version to SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2008, users with full authorization for alerts management are given full authorization to remove user alerts by default, while users with no authorization for alerts management are given no authorization to remove user alerts by default.

But when I tried to delete by call up the relevant alert, right click and choose 'Remove', the alert is just not remove. Any idea?

entry.title: BAPI to update BUT000-XDELE in copy program of VD05?
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I have cloned Transaction VD05 into custom and added an additional field but000-XDELE on screen 0510, Now on click on save i want BUT000 table to be updated with XDELE field whatever is passed on screen for respective customer.
Any BAPI that i can use for this requirement?
Regards, 
Poornima

entry.title: CDS view for material cost history
entry.content:
We need a CDS view that can provide material cost history. We are on SAP S/5 HANA Cloud 2402. The table MBEWH provides the required information but it cannot be used in a CDS view.

Any suggestions?

Jayshree

entry.title: Re: How to sort based on user input values
entry.content: Thanks for your approach

entry.title: Series period does not match current period 65171 SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

When I am trying to upload the Purchase Blanket Agreement data with DTW then I am facing error like

"Created Failed 241000009 Series period does not match current period 65171 "

SAP Business One 

Issue : Purchase Blanket Agreement DTW data

Kind regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: Yes, the certificate must be installed on the device.  It will not fetch it from somewhere else it must already exist on the device.

entry.title: Re: Alert - 'Save History' option not working
entry.content:
Hi,

The following is the summary of the issue:
1. The issue happen to a specific alert only
2. The 'Save history' function is not tick, however, the alert appear as saved history.
3. I tested others alert there is no issue.
4. I have tested and checked on the alert query there is no issue also.
5. I renamed the existing alert and inactive it.
6. Created a new alert , this newly created alert with the same setup, same query, same condition have no issue.

entry.title: Re: Orderby Query in Offline Mode for Object Tables
entry.content: Please check your $metadata for the Asset_Manager_V2_Demo.service for the ItemNo field in the entity set.  I suspect the data type is String which when sorted will give the results you describe.  When you call your online service it is handling the sorting so it correctly comes out based on an integer sort.  You may need to change the data type of the ItemNo field in your service or possibly add another field of type Integer to get your desired results.

entry.title: Re: Side Drawer bind with Entity set
entry.content:
I am not sure I understand what you are looking to do?  Are you trying to display a menu row in the side drawer for each item in an entity set?

Side drawer is a menu / navigation tool and not designed to display lots of rows as from an entity set.  You may need to reconsider your app design in this case.

entry.title: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment
entry.content: F110 need for sible payment to multiple invoice but currently generate invoice wise payment

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: Hey @bill_froelich, thanks for your reply, if you could share some reference on how to install a certificate and which type of certificate will this MDK Client require because in my android device there are multiple certificates already exists. I created a keystore to sign my build when building it with cloud build feature from mobile service cockpit. Also have created some ".cert" and ".pem" with openssl cmd. Please help me with some more knowledge on this really appreciate your help here.

entry.title: Re: Certificate based authentication in MDK client
entry.content: What type of certificate will depend on your identity provider supports and wants.

entry.title: Re: How can we create a FORM using SAP Adobe Forms BTP from a S4 HANA onPrem system
entry.content:
Hi @prvn774: Yes actually I dint understand the architecture properly.The solution is we need not use Form API or even the Cloud level Template store.

Kindly refer this link https://help.sap.com/docs/forms-service-by-adobe/sap-forms-service-neo/architecture.Even though it is for Neo they have given better expalination

as per the above lines we can understand that The ADS service alone we are going to use from cloud whereas the Template Repository and ABAP code all gonna be the same as classical way . So  only the config to the ADS changes and nothing else going to change.

entry.title: Re: converting XML fields into single json string
entry.content:
Hi Nagaraju,

The below XSLT will suits for requirement,

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">

    <xsl:output method="text" encoding="UTF-8"/>

       <xsl:template match="/">

        <xsl:text>{</xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"client_id": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/client_id"/>

        <xsl:text>", </xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"client_secret": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/client_secret"/>

        <xsl:text>", </xsl:text>

        <xsl:text>"grant_type": "</xsl:text>

        <xsl:value-of select="/request/grant_type"/>

        <xsl:text>"}</xsl:text>

    </xsl:template>

</xsl:stylesheet>

Thanks,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: How to delete alert
entry.content:
Hi beehoiphoebe_yeo

Please check SAP note 3156621 for the issue faced.

Hope it helps.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Is it possible to print smartform directly to printer in background Job ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where i need to print smartform directly to printer in background job.

entry.title: Getting timeout error when using for loop.
entry.content:
Dear All,
I am using for loop to improve the performance of the report but still getting error like timeout error(dump).
So, How to solve?
Thanks in Advance.
My implemented code: 
it_final = value #( for lsmatdoc in it_matdoc
                     let zval = reduce labst( init lv_x type labst for lsmatdoc2 in it_matdoc2
                          WHERE ( matbf = lsmatdoc-matbf and charg_sid = lsmatdoc-charg_sid )
                         next lv_x = lv_x + lsmatdoc2-dmbtr_stock )
                         zqun = reduce labst( init lv_Y type labst for lsmat2 in it_matdoc2
                            WHERE ( matbf = lsmatdoc-matbf and charg_sid = lsmatdoc-charg_sid )
                         next lv_y = lv_y + lsmat2-stock_qty )
                         zday = lcl_cal=>cal_days( exporting dt1 = value #( it_mcha[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf charg = lsmatdoc-charg_sid werks = lsmatdoc-werks ]-ersda
                                                                                    default lsmatdoc-bldat  ) )
                     in
                   (
                    matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf
                    stloc = lsmatdoc-lgort_sid
                    plant = lsmatdoc-werks
                    batch = lsmatdoc-charg_sid
                    maktx = value #( it_makt[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf ]-maktx default space )
                    zvalu = zval
                    zquan = zqun
                    ztotv = cond labst( when RB1 EQ 'X' THEN ZQUN
                                        WHEN RB2 EQ 'X' THEN zval )
                    grndt = value #( it_mcha[ matnr = lsmatdoc-matbf charg = lsmatdoc-charg_sid werks = lsmatdoc-werks ]-ersda default lsmatdoc-bldat  )
                    zdayy = zday
                    zthit = cond i( when zday le 30 and RB1 eq 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 30 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zsixt = cond i( when zday le 60 and zday ge 31 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 60 and zday ge 31 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    znint = cond i( when zday le 90 and zday ge 61 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 90 and zday ge 61 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zotwt = cond i( when zday le 120 and zday ge 91 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 120 and zday ge 91 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zofif = cond i( when zday le 150 and zday ge 121 AND RB1 EQ 'X' then zqun
                                    when zday le 150 and zday ge 121 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zoeit = cond i( when zday le 180 and zday ge 151 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 180 and zday ge 151 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztwtn = cond i( when zday le 210 and zday ge 181 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 210 and zday ge 181 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztfor = cond i( when zday le 240 and zday ge 211 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 240 and zday ge 211 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztsev = cond i( when zday le 270 and zday ge 241 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 270 and zday ge 241 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztthr = cond i( when zday le 300 and zday ge 271 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 300 and zday ge 271 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zttht = cond i( when zday le 330 and zday ge 301 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 330 and zday ge 301 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    ztsix = cond i( when zday le 360 and zday ge 331 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                    when zday le 360 and zday ge 331 AND RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                    else ' ' )
                    zmsix = cond string( when zday ge 365 AND RB1 EQ 'X'  then zqun
                                         when zday ge 365 and RB2 EQ 'X' then zval
                                         else ' ' )

                    remarks = cond string( when zday le 180 then 'Moving'
                                           when zday le 366 and zday gt 180 then 'Slow moving item'
                                           else 'Non Moving Item' ) ) ).

entry.title: Multiple service PO for a single PR
entry.content:
Hi SAP members,

I have a scenario where a user generates a service PR.
While generating a PO with reference to the PR the PO is generated
When another user generates a PO with reference to the same PR a duplicate PO is generated.. this should not happen... where should the configuration be done... solutions welcome

Thanks in advance...!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hi, 
someone already raised a request within the influence portal regarding this: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/323462/

Anyway: From my point of view this is not a real feature, more a missing function which differs from all other current available access policies. So would be great to change this by SAP without waiting for huge number of customer votes and before 2025. 😉

entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP-based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on-premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment.

Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Friday 28th June 2024 in Bengaluru, India from 9:00 - 16:00 IST. 

Location: Mindset Experience India Pvt. Ltd, WeWork Galaxy, 43 Residency Road, Shanthala Nagar, Ashok Nagar, Bengaluru - 560025

The event is kindly being hosted by Mindset Consulting, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 35 attendees. If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page.

The instructors are Developer Advocates Sheena M K , Shilpa Shankar and Ajay Soreng. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: converting XML fields into single json string
entry.content:
Dear Ismail,

thanks for you immediate response. sorry its my bad i have not given clarity in my question about my requirment, i have checked in the operation mapping but i am not getting the proper output what i have expected.

let me explain my requirement first. i have to send the data ( 3 fields ) to the rest api in the body level especially  x-www-form-urlencoded. i have read some of few blogs in sap but they have achieved this requirement through java mapping but i don't want to go this approach because i don't have any knowledge on java. so i choose xslt mapping approach. even i have tried the xslt code in the chatgpt also but not getting as excepted, chatgpt code level getting single sting as a out put but not getting values. i would request you could you please make the changes in the chatgpt code if possible.

your xslt code response in Operation mapping:

 

My requirement in the postman collection :

 

my request payload in the operation mapping :

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ xmlns:ns0="urn://x-www-form-urlencoded/checking/atreceiver/rest">
<client_id>sfv24</client_id>
<client_secret>45g34</client_secret>
<grant_type>doif4</grant_type>
</ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ>

expecting output : 

client_id=iweu245&client_secret=oirt3453&grant_type=u4wonok64

 

output level field & vlaues seperated by "=" ( equals to ) and seperator : "&"

 

chatgpt xslt code :

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
xmlns:ns0="urn://x-www-form-urlencoded/checking/atreceiver/rest">

<xsl:output method="text"/>

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:text>client_id=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:client_id"/>
<xsl:text>&client_secret=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:client_secret"/>
<xsl:text>&grant_type=</xsl:text>
<xsl:value-of select="//ns0:MT_x_www_form_urlencoded_REQ/ns0:grant_type"/>
</xsl:template>

</xsl:stylesheet>

 

chatgpt xslt code output in operation mapping:

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Nagaraju

Supported Protocols and Authentication Methods

entry.title: Re: Not able to cascade a picklist ( State & City )
entry.content:
The error you're encountering seems to be related to the configuration of cascading picklists in your system. This type of error typically occurs when there is a mismatch or misconfiguration in the way the picklists are set up and referenced. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you troubleshoot and resolve the issue:

Step-by-Step Troubleshooting

  1. Verify Picklist Creation:

    • Ensure that both the 'State' (parent) and 'City' (child) picklists have been created correctly with all the necessary values.

  2. Assign Picklists to MDF Object:

    • Confirm that the picklists are correctly assigned to the MDF object 'Business Unit'.
    • Check that the fields cust_state and cust_city are correctly configured to use the State and City picklists respectively.

  3. Check Field Criteria:

    • The error indicates an issue with the field criteria configuration for cascading the picklists. Review the criteria to ensure they are correctly set up.

  4. Review the Cascading Configuration:

    • Ensure that the cascading configuration is set up properly in the system. This typically involves specifying the source field (parent picklist) and the destination field (child picklist).

      Detailed Steps:

      Step 1: Verify Picklist Values

      • Go to the picklist management section and verify that the values for both 'State' and 'City' are correctly defined.

      Step 2: Assign Picklists to MDF Object

      • Navigate to the MDF object definition for 'Business Unit'.
      • Ensure that the cust_state field is configured to use the 'State' picklist and the cust_city field is configured to use the 'City' picklist.

      Step 3: Check Field Criteria

      • Review the field criteria setup for cascading picklists:
        • Ensure that the sourceFieldName is correctly specified as the field that contains the parent picklist values (in this case, it should be cust_state).
        • Ensure that the destinationFieldValue is correctly specified to match the child picklist field (in this case, cust_city).

    • Step 4: Configure Cascading Picklists

      • Go to the cascading picklist configuration section.
      • Add a new cascading rule if it’s not already created.
        • Set Source Field to the parent picklist field (cust_state).
        • Set Destination Field to the child picklist field (cust_city).
        • Map the parent picklist values to the corresponding child picklist values.

      • Example Configuration:

        Parent Picklist (State)

        Value Label
        CACalifornia
        TXTexas

        Child Picklist (City)

        Value Label Parent Value (State)
        LALos AngelesCA
        SFSan FranciscoCA
        ATXAustinTX
        DALDallasTX
    • Field Criteria Example:
      sourceFieldName: 'cust_state'
      destinationFieldValue: 'cust_city'
      defaultDestinationValue: ''

    • Common Pitfalls:

      • Incorrect Field Names: Double-check that the field names used in the cascading configuration match the actual field names in the MDF object.
      • Case Sensitivity: Ensure that the field names are case-sensitive and match exactly.
      • Picklist Value Mapping: Ensure that every parent picklist value has a corresponding child picklist value mapped correctly.

      By following these steps, you should be able to resolve the cascading picklist error. If the issue persists, please provide more details about your configuration, and I'll be happy to assist further.

entry.title: Re: Export for transport type CBC locked. No target syste...
entry.content: Hello Lucian thank you for your answer. I am not trying to export a customizing request form a development tenant. I am in the customizing tenant of the development system, and when we wanted to activate RITA, looks like the system was telling us that the customizing objects are locked in a CBC Transport Request. So we thought we could release that CBC Transport request (and if there is an order to respect, to release the other CBC Transports before this one), and then carry on with our customizing, in our own customizing transport request. Now we feel like we are stick with this RITA Activation because of this lock issue. Regards

entry.title: Re: GenAI Agentic Workflows with the Supply Chain Advisor
entry.content:
very well written @vedant_gupta. It is nice to see an example where LLM agent is used to solve a business challenge especially in supply chain area. 

LLM agents combined with RAG can be a powerful approach to solve real business problems.

entry.title: Re: Authenticating an API using SAML assertion in SAP API...
entry.content:
Hi @giridhar_vegi,

when generating the SAML assertion yourself in APIM you are essentially declaring it your identity provider. That is a severe security risk. Any error or exploitable gap would to lead to user compromise. Identity Providers are purpose-built for this. I am assuming you are bypassing another challenge by looking to implement this yourself. Feel free to share more, so the community can advise on solving the underlying challenge.

If you must explore further have a look at this javascript library and this ApiGee article how to generate your own in SAP APIM. Make sure to lock down access tightly. Either way, I highly discourage this.

KR Martin

entry.title: Re: 10 Steps to Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition for Customers
entry.content: Is it possible for Partner organizations to register members as well?

entry.title: Re: CD/CD with SAP Native HANA Application dev space
entry.content: Hi, I'm referring to the project type as indicated in the image(SAP HANA Database Project).

entry.title: Re: How to start a java application in BTP from Job Sched...
entry.content:
A cf task is pretty much any CLI command you want to send to the container of the app. But you will be constrained to the installed CLI commands in the container of what is possible.

For a NodeJs application I could run "npm start" to start my application or "node -v" to get version info, Java has similar commands. These commands would be the value for your 'action'.

To test which cli commands are understood in your container (before configuring the task) you could run the below in your terminal and check in the logs of the deployed app what the output/error is:

cf run-task MYAPP --command "echo 12345"

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation API

entry.title: Re: Billing Error: For object RV_BELEG, number range inte...
entry.content:
There may be regional variations for some countries.

SPRO-Sales and Distribution-Billing-Billing Documents-
Country-specific Features

 

In my case for a Polish company without additional regional customization the system did not see the range of invoice numbers.

entry.title: Re: Time Off Recruit Rule: Rounding up in 0.5s
entry.content: Hi @EvangeliaP,
